business.name: Tampa Bay HVAC Pro
business.tagline: Keeping Tampa Bay Cool — Rain or Shine

hero.headline: Same-Day HVAC Service *Built for Florida* — Hurricane-Ready Systems
hero.subheadline: Local Tampa Bay experts specializing in AC repair, maintenance plans, and storm-resistant installations. Emergency service available 24/7.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete HVAC Solutions for Tampa Bay
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to preventive maintenance, we keep your home comfortable year-round

services.title: Emergency AC Repair
services.description: 24/7 same-day service for system breakdowns. Our technicians carry parts for most major brands and can diagnose issues quickly to get you cool fast.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance Plans
services.description: Seasonal tune-ups, filter changes, and system inspections to prevent costly breakdowns. Plans start at $129/year with priority scheduling.

services.title: Heat Pump Service & Repair
services.description: Complete heat pump diagnostics, repairs, and replacements. We service all major brands and can upgrade to more efficient models.

services.title: Hurricane-Ready Installations
services.description: Storm-resistant HVAC systems designed for Florida weather. Impact-rated units and surge protection to keep you comfortable through severe weather.

services.title: Air Quality Solutions
services.description: Indoor air quality testing, duct cleaning, and UV sanitization systems to combat Florida humidity and allergens.

about.heading: Tampa Bay HVAC Experts Since 2015
about.body: We're local Tampa Bay residents who understand Florida's unique climate challenges. Our team specializes in humid subtropical conditions, hurricane preparedness, and energy-efficient cooling solutions. We've helped thousands of families stay comfortable through Florida's toughest summers and unexpected weather events.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Our AC died during the heat wave in July and they came out the same day! Technician was professional, explained everything, and had us cool within 2 hours. Definitely using them for maintenance going forward.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Been on their maintenance plan for 3 years now. They caught a refrigerant leak early last spring that could have been a $3,000 repair. Plan pays for itself and gives me peace of mind.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Installed a new hurricane-rated system before last season. When Hurricane Ian came through, we never lost cooling while neighbors were without power for days. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Called them for emergency service on Sunday morning. Tech arrived within 3 hours, diagnosed the issue, and fixed it on the spot. Fair pricing and excellent service.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable HVAC service throughout Hillsborough County and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to Beat the Florida Heat?
cta.body: Get same-day service from Tampa Bay's most trusted HVAC professionals. Free estimates on all installations and repairs.
